title: Invisible Human Origin
description: Adds an Origin to turn invisible or to constantly glow
body:
All this mod is made to do is to give you either a permanent invisibility potion effect or a permanent glowing effect depending on which one of the two origins you choose

Invisibility Origin

IMPACT: 🟢⚫⚫

(=) You're Invisible > That's exactly what it sounds like. You have a permenant invisibility effect (=) Armor Exists > Armor still renders due to the fact that all the origin does is give you invisibility

Glowing Origin

IMPACT: 🟢⚫⚫

(-) You're Glowing > Why would you ever want to be glowing unless you want to be found?
